summary: Comprehensive testing of Iteration 5 features: Admin credentials update, Backend Cart API, Admin Orders management, Bilingual legal pages (Privacy Policy & Terms of Service), and Profile Orders tab. All features working correctly.

minor.issue: ProductCreate schema was missing description_bg field - FIXED during testing

issues: Some product images show 'No image available' placeholder - expected behavior for wholesale supplier images

critical_code_review_comments: Cart API correctly persists items in MongoDB for logged-in users
Cart syncs localStorage items to backend on login
Orders API properly filters by user role (admin sees all, users see own)
Privacy Policy and Terms of Service have complete Bulgarian translations
Admin product edit form includes description_bg field
Profile Orders tab fetches real orders from backend API
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Iteration 5 features tested and working: (1) Admin login with new credentials verified, (2) Cart API fully functional with add/update/remove/clear operations, (3) Cart persists after re-login, (4) Admin panel has Products tab (186 products) and Orders tab (0 orders - no Stripe purchases completed), (5) Privacy Policy and Terms of Service show Bulgarian content when language is BG, (6) Profile Orders tab shows empty state (no orders yet). ProductCreate schema was fixed to include description_bg field.

frontend.test: Admin panel accessible with Products tab (186 products)
Admin panel Orders tab visible (0 orders)
Cart add product from detail page
Privacy Policy BG content (ПОЛИТИКА ЗА ПОВЕРИТЕЛНОСТ)
Terms of Service BG content (УСЛОВИЯ ЗА ПОЛЗВАНЕ)
Language toggle works on legal pages
Profile Orders tab shows empty state
Admin product edit form has description_bg field

features_verified.backend_cart_api: VERIFIED - All CRUD operations working with MongoDB persistence
features_verified.admin_products_tab: VERIFIED - Shows 186 products with edit/delete actions
features_verified.admin_orders_tab: VERIFIED - Shows 0 orders with status dropdown selector
features_verified.profile_orders_tab: VERIFIED - Fetches real orders from backend (empty state shown)
features_verified.product_description_bg: VERIFIED - Field present in admin edit form
